name: ng-pagination
title: Pagination (Angular)
description: Page navigation surface - composable Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationEllipsis. Anchor tags by default; integrates with the Angular router. Mirrors React Pagination from @gremorie/rx-navigation.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-pagination.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
